name: testusdm-minter
description: TestUSDM token minting and distribution for Cardano Preprod/Preview

scripts.mint: npm run build && node dist/mint-testusdm.js mint
scripts.burn: npm run build && node dist/mint-testusdm.js burn
scripts.distribute: npm run build && node dist/mint-testusdm.js distribute
scripts.balance: npm run build && node dist/mint-testusdm.js balance
scripts.wallet:generate: npm run build && node dist/wallet-utils.js generate
scripts.wallet:import: npm run build && node dist/wallet-utils.js import
scripts.wallet:info: npm run build && node dist/wallet-utils.js info
